entry.name: Theme
entry.label: Colour theme (0 Big Sur, 1 Monterey, 2 Graphite, 3 Sunset, 4 Nord, 5 Laserwave, 6 Vaporwave, 7 Cyberpunk, 8 Outrun, 9 Custom)

entry.name: Style
entry.label: Base look (0 Flow, 1 Hills, 2 Silk curtains, 3 Caustics, 4 Ink in water, 5 Laserwave, 6 Vaporwave, 7 Cyberpunk, 8 Liquid fluid sim)

entry.name: Intensity
entry.label: Colour vividness (1 = as designed, lower = muted)

entry.name: Appearance
entry.label: Light/dark: 0 follow colour scheme, 1 always light, 2 always dark

entry.name: WindowReact
entry.label: React to window movement (0 = off, 1 = full). Needs the aurora window bridge installed (Layer 9 / windows-apply.sh).

entry.name: MusicReact
entry.label: React to music (0 = off, 1 = full). Needs the aurora audio bridge installed (Layer 9 / audio-apply.sh).
